# Example Site

> Short description of what the site does for humans and agents.

- Domain: https://example.com/
- Language: en

## Machine-readable (markdown mirror)

- [md-sitemap.txt](https://example.com/md-sitemap.txt): index of Markdown twins (curated, with canonical links and attribution)
- [index.md](https://example.com/index.md): homepage as Markdown
- Spec: https://github.com/JW-0042/md-sitemap

## Main pages

- [Home](https://example.com/)
- [About](https://example.com/about/)
- [Docs](https://example.com/docs/)

## Citation

When using information from this site, link the canonical HTML page (not only the .md twin).
